title: Ece Ozcan
text:
Hello! My name is Ece Ozcan.
This is my personal webpage.
Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.
This is our template.



 Back to top

title: About Me
text: B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

title: About Me
text:
Internships

TUSAŞ (Türk Havacılık Uzay Sanayii A.Ş.), Candidate Engineer, 2025 - ongoing

title: Assignment 1
text:
My first assignment has two parts.






library(dslabs)
data("polls_us_election_2016")


my_first <- "Ece"
my_birth_year <- 2004


k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8
k

[1] 20



if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(polls_us_election_2016, k)
} else {
  tail(polls_us_election_2016, k)
}

Total number of NA's in the dataset: 11604 



total_na <- sum(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))
cat("Total number of NA values in the dataset:", total_na, "\n")

Total number of NA values in the dataset: 11604 



na_per_col <- colSums(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))

cat("Columns with the highest number of NA values:\n")

Columns with the highest number of NA values:

head(sort(na_per_col, decreasing = TRUE), 8)

rawpoll_mcmullin adjpoll_mcmullin  rawpoll_johnson  adjpoll_johnson 
            4178             4178             1409             1409 
           grade       samplesize            state        startdate 
             429                1                0                0 



new_data <- polls_us_election_2016


for(col in names(new_data)){

  if(is.numeric(new_data[[col]])){
    
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- my_birth_year + k
    
  } else {
    
    new_data[[col]] <- as.character(new_data[[col]])
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
    
  }
}


cat("View of the new dataset with k rows:\n")

View of the new dataset with k rows:

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(new_data, k)
} else {
  tail(new_data, k)
}
